findings.title: useToday hook exists but is never imported
findings.description: src/ui/hooks/useToday.ts was created (presumably in round 4) but never wired into TaskItem.tsx or Today.tsx. The hook is dead code — the components still call new Date() inline in the render path.
findings.fix: Import and use useToday() in TaskItem.tsx and Today.tsx, or delete the unused hook.

findings.title: Zero Zod validation in any API route
findings.description: All 11 API route files (tasks, projects, tags, sections, comments, templates, settings, stats, plugins, ai, voice) parse request bodies with raw c.req.json() and query params with c.req.query() — no Zod validation anywhere. Any malformed input passes straight to core services.
findings.fix: Add Zod schema parsing to request body and query parameter extraction in API handlers. Use zValidator middleware from @hono/zod-validator or manual .safeParse() calls.

findings.title: 11 eslint-disable comments for @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
findings.description: 11 eslint-disable directives across 6 files suppress the no-explicit-any rule. Most are in plugin system boundaries (PluginView, plugin API, builtin-views) where dynamic typing is somewhat justified, but some could be tightened.
findings.fix: Review each disable comment; replace with narrower types (unknown, Record<string, unknown>) where possible.

findings.title: 9 'as any' casts in production code
findings.description: 9 'as any' casts remain across 5 files: browser-stt (Web Speech API), piper-local-tts (third-party lib types), installer (Node streams), and api/plugins (plugin instance). Most are at third-party API boundaries.
findings.fix: Low priority — most are at untyped browser/third-party API boundaries. Consider adding type declarations for SpeechRecognition.
